title: Lasagna
description: Fresh spinach pasta, a slow-cooked pork and beef ragu and a blonde bechamel, stacked into a proper homemade lasagna.
ingredients: 50ml olive oil, plus extra for frying
320g Tipo 00 flour, plus extra for dusting
600ml milk, plus an extra 100ml for the ragu
steps: Cook onion, carrot, celery and garlic into a sofrito.
Brown pork and beef mince, reduce red wine, then simmer with passata, sofrito and Parmesan rind.
Blanch spinach, blend with eggs, combine with Tipo 00 flour and knead into pasta dough.
Rest, roll and blanch the spinach pasta sheets.
Make a bechamel from butter, flour, milk, salt, pepper and nutmeg.
Layer ragu, pasta, bechamel, mozzarella and Parmesan in a baking dish.
Bake covered, then uncover, top with basil and cheese, and bake until golden.
visibleTextSample: Lasagna - Andy Cooks. Fresh spinach pasta, a slow-cooked pork and beef ragu and a blonde bechamel, stacked into a proper homemade lasagna.
